title: Havilah Hostel Inc — Public safety
investigation_objective: The Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission entered an Enforceable Undertaking with Havilah Hostel Inc, a Maryborough, Victoria facility holding an overall 3-star rating as at 17 July 2025, signed 3 October 2025. The undertaking followed a Commission desktop monitoring assessment (4 April 2025) that identified non-compliance with Quality Standards 2, 3, 7 and 8.
scope: Entered an Enforceable Undertaking with the Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission; Commission assessment identified non-compliance across four separate Aged Care Quality Standards
primary_sources: Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission
